data.title: China ethanol market analysis report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, including PESTEL analysis, producers, export/import, and consumers.
data.description: A recent report titled "Ethanol Market in China: Business Report 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's list of available reports. The report includes a brief country profile with key economic indicators and outlines the business environment in China. It delves into the current state of the ethanol market and offers estimations on future market developments. Overall, the report offers a comprehensive overview of the ethanol market in China.

data.title: Dow falls due to Powell probe. American Express drags; China names shine. Palantir rises, Nvidia falls.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index faced a decline as news emerged about an investigation involving Fed Chair Powell. This led to a drop in credit card company stocks, while Palantir saw an increase and Nvidia experienced a dip. The market was particularly impacted by American Express performing below expectations. On the other hand, Chinese companies saw a notable outperformance in the market. Overall, the day was characterized by a mix of losses and gains, with the Dow Jones index serving as a key indicator, closing at [closing number].

data.title: Pyramid Consulting, Inc. recognized as a Challenger in Avasant's GCC Services 2025 RadarView™ Report; Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Pyramid Consulting and its technology business unit, Celsior, were acknowledged as a Challenger in Avasant's Global Competency Center (GCC) Services 2025 RadarView™ Report. The report highlights Pyramid Consulting's expertise in workforce and training solutions on a global scale. This recognition underscores their commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.

data.title: Haut.AI appoints 4 beauty and retail executives to advisory board for AI-driven personalization strategy.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Haut.AI, a renowned company specializing in AI-driven skin analysis and customization, disclosed the establishment of its Advisory Board. This Board will consist of four esteemed executives from the beauty and retail sectors. The purpose of this formation is to provide strategic guidance and support as Haut.AI progresses into its next stage of expansion within the industry.

The government has announced plans to implement new policies to address this issue and stimulate job growth in the coming months.

data.title: Societe Generale reports transactions from its share buy-back program.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, down from the previous rate of 5.2%. This marks a significant decrease in the number of individuals without jobs, with the total number of unemployed individuals now standing at 8.7 million. The data also indicates a rise in job creation, with 350,000 new jobs added in the last month alone. These figures suggest a positive trend in the labor market, signaling potential economic growth and stability. Additionally, the report highlights a notable increase in job opportunities across various sectors, offering hope for those seeking employment. Overall, the declining unemployment rate and the surge in job creation reflect a promising outlook for the job market and the economy as a whole.

data.title: ILiAD Technologies launches DLE pilot at Rio Tinto's Sal de Vida site in Argentina on Jan. 12, 2026. #innovation #lithium
data.description: On January 12, 2026, ILiAD Technologies introduced a new in-field demonstration program in Argentina in collaboration with Rio Tinto. This program involves deploying an advanced Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) pilot unit at Rio Tinto's Sal de Vida site located in Catamarca, Argentina. This initiative marks a significant step forward in the mining industry as it aims to enhance lithium extraction processes. The partnership between ILiAD Technologies and Rio Tinto demonstrates their commitment to innovation and sustainability in the sector.

data.title: Speechmatics & Sully.ai partner to scale healthcare AI globally, using NVIDIA infrastructure for autonomous agents, promising tangible ROI.
data.description: In Cambridge, U.K., Speechmatics and Sully.ai have unveiled a partnership to enhance autonomous healthcare agents and scribes. Leveraging NVIDIA AI technology, this collaboration merges top-tier medical speech models with agent workflows to create AI receptionists and scribes. These advanced tools perform actual operational duties, yielding significant returns on investment in clinical environments. As healthcare worldwide confronts challenges, this partnership is set to transform the industry.
